title: Perps withdraw input centering proof
description: Validates that the hero fiat amount input container is full-width and content is centered in the perps withdraw flow. Without w-full, the container is content-sized (~82% of parent) causing left-alignment in narrow popup viewports.

ac1-assert-full-width-centered.expression: (function(){var input=document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-fiat-hero-amount-input"]');var symbol=document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-fiat-hero-amount-symbol"]');if(!input||!symbol){return JSON.stringify({error:'elements not found',heroFillsParent:false,contentCentered:false});}var heroBox=input.parentElement;var parentBox=heroBox.parentElement;var heroRect=heroBox.getBoundingClientRect();var parentRect=parentBox.getBoundingClientRect();var widthRatio=heroRect.width/parentRect.width;var heroFillsParent=widthRatio>=0.95;var symRect=symbol.getBoundingClientRect();var inputRect=input.getBoundingClientRect();var contentLeft=symRect.left;var contentRight=inputRect.right;var contentCenter=(contentLeft+contentRight)/2;var boxCenter=heroRect.left+heroRect.width/2;var contentOffset=Math.abs(contentCenter-boxCenter);var contentCentered=contentOffset<=20;return JSON.stringify({heroW:Math.round(heroRect.width),parentW:Math.round(parentRect.width),widthRatio:+widthRatio.toFixed(2),heroFillsParent:heroFillsParent,contentCenter:Math.round(contentCenter),boxCenter:Math.round(boxCenter),contentOffset:Math.round(contentOffset),contentCentered:contentCentered});})()
